title: Stop endpoint → ACTIVE → STOPPED transition
evidence: All 8 TC-022 tests passed in 1515ms: - ✓ Creates ACTIVE tenant in DB via direct insert - ✓ POST /stop returns 200 {status: "stopped"} - ✓ Tenant DB status is STOPPED after /stop call - ✓ last_stopped_at is set on the tenant row - ✓ TENANT_STOPPED audit event written with system actor + containerName metadata - ✓ dockerStop called once with correct container name and timeout=10 - ✓ Second POST /stop is idempotent → returns 200 {status: "already_stopped"} - ✓ dockerStop still called only once (idempotent second call does not invoke docker) The only test failure in the suite was TC-015 (pre-existing, unrelated to TC-022).
